sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95655" key="sofistia/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σοφισ-τιάω</orth>, <sense id="n95655.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">play the sophist</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0457.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eubulid.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.42a</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">545c</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
